positive: A highly stylized, modern graphic illustration of a majestic, wandering celestial fox (kitsune) composed of glowing geometric energy lines and ethereal smoke. The fox is depicted in a dynamic, mid-stride pose, centered against a deep midnight blue gradient background speckled with abstract nebula dust and stylized constellations. The artwork must have strong, clean silhouettes with glowing neon accents (cyan and magenta) and limited color palette for high contrast printability. Minimalist composition, perfect for T-shirt graphic print. Vector art style, clean lines, isometric perspective, octane render, volumetric lighting, vibrant pop art aesthetic, deep contrast.
negative: blurry, ugly, low quality, text, signature, logo, watermark, cropped, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, noisy, poor resolution, realistic photography, photorealistic, messy lines
